projects.name: Athlete Management Platform
detailed_description: Built a full-stack athlete management platform to manage athlete profiles, progress data, weekly tasks, highlights, and training workflows in a unified system.
Integrated Firebase Authentication, Firestore, React-based frontend flows, and backend services to support real user operations and secure application access.
Connected AI modules, booking-related functionality, and performance tracking features so athletes, coaches, and platform admins could work within one ecosystem.

projects.name: AI Coach for Athletes
detailed_description: Developed an AI-based coaching assistant that generated personalized responses for athletes based on their profile, activity context, and training-related inputs.
Integrated OpenAI-powered workflows into the broader athlete platform to deliver guidance without forcing users to leave the main product experience.
Focused on practical product value by designing the assistant around real athlete use cases rather than a standalone chat demo.

projects.name: Facility and Event Management System
detailed_description: Built a booking and event scheduling system that managed facilities, date ranges, availability slots, and event-related reservations.
Integrated calendar-driven logic so facility availability could be checked, updated, and marked as booked through application workflows.
Designed the feature to support operational use cases where sports facilities, rooms, or spaces must be assigned reliably across multiple events.

projects.name: Video Analysis System for Athletes
detailed_description: Implemented a video analysis pipeline for athlete exercises using computer vision techniques to process uploaded videos and generate exercise-related insights.
Designed the workflow around serverless execution and storage integration so uploaded media could be analyzed and replaced with processed output.
Planned the system to support multiple movement types such as squats, push-ups, balance, plank hold, and stretching exercises.

projects.name: FitGenie - AI Fitness and Nutrition Assistant
detailed_description: Built a full-stack AI fitness and nutrition application with authentication, dashboard workflows, profile setup, and personalized plan generation.
Designed a multi-step plan generation flow where users provide goals, schedule, and diet preferences before receiving AI-generated workout and nutrition plans.
Implemented version-style revise and finalize flows for generated plans to make the application feel closer to a production SaaS experience than a simple AI demo.

projects.name: Job Application Tracker
detailed_description: Designed a job tracking product that goes beyond basic CRUD by modeling pipeline stages, transitions, reminders, analytics, and activity history.
Planned a production-style architecture with JWT authentication, stage-based Kanban workflows, PostgreSQL-backed persistence, and backend-driven transition logic.
Framed the project around product thinking by solving real job search pain points such as stalled applications, interview management, and process visibility.

projects.name: Prompt Workflow Studio
detailed_description: Designed an AI workflow orchestration platform centered around graph-based prompt pipelines with nodes such as prompt, tool, memory, validator, and output.
Focused on observability, reproducibility, versioning, and run inspection so complex prompt workflows could be treated like real engineering systems.
Positioned the product as a solution to replace ad hoc prompt scripts with structured, collaborative, and auditable workflow execution.

projects.name: Creator Campaign Copilot
detailed_description: Built and evolved a multi-brand campaign operations workspace for managing projects, campaigns, briefs, reviews, milestones, analytics, templates, and billing controls.
Structured the product around real operational questions faced by content and marketing teams so planning, approvals, collaboration, and tracking could live in one system.
Explored MCP-assisted helper tools as an extension layer to support guideline retrieval, validation, template access, and review summarization.

projects.name: Career Growth Platform
detailed_description: Built a platform concept focused on helping users identify skill gaps, receive personalized learning paths, connect with mentors, build portfolios, and track progress.
Drove the project through a product and UX process that included personas, journey maps, task analysis, heuristic evaluation, usability testing, and structured design iterations.
Used the project to connect research insights with interface design and product requirements instead of treating design deliverables as isolated coursework artifacts.

projects.name: George Soros RAG Chatbot
detailed_description: Built a retrieval-augmented chatbot grounded on a curated George Soros corpus so generated answers could stay tied to source material.
Designed the pipeline around chunking, embeddings, vector retrieval, prompt orchestration, memory, and safety controls to improve answer grounding.
Used the project to demonstrate applied GenAI engineering with a stronger focus on reliable retrieval and context-aware answering.

projects.name: Pairs Trading Lab
detailed_description: Built a quantitative finance module that identifies candidate pairs using correlation and cointegration concepts before modeling spread behavior.
Implemented rolling statistics and z-score driven signal generation to support long and short trade decision logic suitable for backtesting workflows.
Combined finance-oriented analytical thinking with software implementation to create a research-oriented, reproducible experimentation setup.

projects.name: Laboratory Data Directory
detailed_description: Led development of a laboratory data directory web application to improve accessibility of experiment-related data and user interaction for internal stakeholders.
Used FastAPI, PostgreSQL, SQLAlchemy, and Angular-oriented application patterns to build a system that supported structured data management workflows.
Focused on cleaner ORM interactions and maintainable backend design so the system could scale more reliably as features and data complexity grew.

projects.name: AWS DevOps and API Development Project Set
detailed_description: Completed a set of cloud-focused projects involving API development, EC2 hosting, static hosting, IAM, networking, load balancing, and environment configuration.
Used the work to gain practical familiarity with how applications are deployed, exposed, secured, and monitored in AWS-based environments.
Approached the project set as a systems learning experience rather than just isolated cloud service exercises.

projects.name: ChurnOps
detailed_description: Built an end-to-end MLOps-style project covering model training, experiment tracking, model registration, API serving, and service monitoring.
Integrated operational tooling such as MLflow, FastAPI, Prometheus, Grafana, and Airflow to show how prediction systems are managed in production-like environments.
Approached the project from an operations and deployment perspective, using it as a bridge between DevOps interests and practical ML lifecycle exposure.

projects.name: Recipe Hub
detailed_description: Built a recipe-sharing web application that allows users to discover, save, manage, and interact with recipe content through a structured web experience.
Implemented authentication and CRUD-based workflows so users could maintain their own recipe-related data and application state.
Used the project to strengthen full-stack fundamentals and build a polished user-facing application around a familiar real-world use case.

projects.name: Finance Tracker
detailed_description: Developed a personal finance application with secure login, budgeting support, categorized expenses, and transaction tracking workflows.
Built the interface to support responsive user interactions while using Firebase-backed services for authentication and data storage.
Focused on clean frontend behavior and practical day-to-day usability for a personal productivity use case.

projects.name: Real Estate Management System
detailed_description: Created a property-oriented management application for listing, searching, and handling real estate-related information in a structured interface.
Designed user-facing workflows around browsing and managing property records to simulate a practical line-of-business application.
Used the project to strengthen object-oriented programming and application design skills in a Java-based development environment.

projects.name: AI Solutions Hub Webflow Platform Work
detailed_description: Built and customized Webflow-based website experiences for Northeastern's Institute for Experiential AI, including CMS-driven sections and advanced custom embeds.
Implemented filtering behavior, query-parameter-driven interactions, and dynamic case study browsing experiences using custom JavaScript and Webflow CMS patterns.
Used the work to bridge no-code CMS tooling with production-grade frontend thinking, architecture decisions, and user experience improvements.
projects.associated_with: Institute for Experiential AI at Northeastern University

projects.name: RFID-Based Smart Billing System
detailed_description: Built an RFID-enabled billing system intended to reduce manual checkout time and improve retail-style transaction flow.
Used embedded system components and controller programming to automate item detection and billing-related behavior.
Applied the project in an internship context to solve a real operational inefficiency rather than just build a classroom prototype.

projects.name: Face Mask Detection Model
detailed_description: Built a computer vision model for real-time face mask detection using image processing and machine learning workflows.
Used the project to explore practical public-safety-oriented inference use cases with camera input and detection output.
Strengthened experience in applying model-building concepts to a visible, real-time vision task.

projects.name: Sign Language Recognition System
detailed_description: Created a gesture recognition system that maps hand movements or signs to corresponding outputs to support accessibility-oriented interaction.
Used computer vision and machine learning concepts to recognize visual input patterns and convert them into meaningful signals.
Approached the project as a socially useful application of AI rather than a purely academic exercise.

projects.name: Hand Gesture Controlled Robot
detailed_description: Built a robot controlled through hand gestures using accelerometer-based input and wireless communication between control and motion components.
Programmed the system to translate tilt-based gestures into directional robotic movement for intuitive control without a physical joystick or remote.
Used the project to combine embedded programming, hardware interfacing, and robotics-oriented control logic.

projects.name: IMU-Controlled Drone with Object Detection
detailed_description: Built a drone-oriented system that combines IMU-based stabilization ideas with computer vision-driven object detection and obstacle awareness.
Explored how onboard processing and sensor data can work together to support navigation adjustments based on detected environmental conditions.
Used the project as a multidisciplinary exercise across embedded systems, computer vision, and robotics.

projects.name: Signal Processing and Fourier Transform Web Application
detailed_description: Developed a web-based application to visualize signals in both time and frequency domains for better conceptual understanding of signal behavior.
Implemented Fast Fourier Transform logic to convert time-domain signals into their frequency-domain representation in an interactive way.
Used the project to connect engineering theory with practical software visualization for educational and analytical value.

projects.name: Line Follower Bot Using Arduino Uno
detailed_description: Designed and built an autonomous line-following robot using IR sensors to detect path boundaries and control directional movement in real time.
Implemented motor control logic on Arduino Uno to continuously interpret sensor signals and make movement adjustments.
Used the project to strengthen core embedded systems skills through hands-on robotics and sensor-actuator integration.
